form.formComment: Comes here second-up after a week-and-a-half. Lacklustre first-up performance when 6th (Fr7) over 1609m at Pocono Downs, beaten 40 m by Boom (1:51.00) in NW9500L5 on March 28 at $25.80. Will not find this easy. Not keen.
